# Phase 7 Governance Closure Plan

This planning note records Phase 7.13 final runtime governance closure-review architecture. It is read-only and non-executing.

## Scope

- final governance closure review doctrine
- constitutional integrity verification
- governance completeness review
- runtime-subordination verification
- cross-layer survivability verification
- institutional durability verification
- governance consistency review
- governance closure assertions
- governance civilization readiness
- long-horizon containment verification
- final continuity verification
- governance closure review templates
- governance closure blockers and escalation

## Out Of Scope

- runtime authorization
- deployment authorization
- automated governance closure
- autonomous governance certification
- autonomous closure systems
- execution-capable governance systems
- machine-authorized governance
- runtime activation systems
- executable review systems
- runtime activation
- provider activation
- executable workflows
- deployment automation

## Completion Criteria

- Closure planning remains subordinate to human governance review.
- Closure doctrine cannot authorize execution.
- Governance completeness ambiguity fails closed.
- Cross-layer inconsistency blocks closure.
- Traceability gaps block closure interpretation use.
- Runtime-disabled truth remains preserved.
